hoursOfOperation.remarks:
LKRMZ2 VODOCHODY is always activated when CTR/TMA VODOCHODY is deactivated.
During the activation of LKRMZ2 VODOCHODY, no information to known traffic or AFIS service is provided; only airto- air communication takes place on FREQ 133.080 (VODOCHODY TOWER), see LKVO AD 2.20.8 LKRMZ2 VODOCHODY.
